title: Verify --from <stage> flag skips earlier pipeline stages
description: Two-step verification test for the `--from <stage>` CLI flag: (1) confirm the currently-running pipeline completes normally (status.json shows taskify stage in progress since 03:56:32 UTC), (2) trigger a new pipeline invocation with `@kody --from build` and confirm logs show 'Resuming from: build' with taskify and plan stages skipped while build stage runs.
